goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 17:30' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '3 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 17:30 and should leave on thursday
The train should depart from london liverpool street and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 3 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get address and area
